subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of God and handmaidens of the All-Merciful! The sun is nigh unto setting, the orb of day declineth, and 'Abdu'l-Bahá remembereth you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان یزدان و اماء رحمان قریب غروب است و آفتاب رو به افول و عبدالبهاء بیاد شما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual transformation
